channel.title: AI Daily Pulse
channel.itunes:author: Ashwin Labs
channel.itunes:summary: Your daily 15-minute conversational deep dive into latest AI developments. Optimized 10-12 word summaries.

item.title: **Global Markets Surge As NVIDIA Reveals The First Fully Autonomous AGI Chip**
item.description:
Intelligence Brief:

  • Real-time AI Intelligence Update

**AI Daily Pulse** **Episode Date:** Friday, March 27, 2026 **Hosts:** Alex (Technical Architect) & Marcus (Strategic Visionary) [AUDIO START: Low-fi electronic beat, high energy but professional] **MARCUS:** Good morning and welcome to the Pulse. It is Friday, March 27, 2026. I’m Marcus, and we are looking at a landscape this morning that looks nothing like it did even six months ago. The big story hitting the wires at 4:00 AM today is the official rollout of "Astra-V." This isn't just anothe...
item.itunes:author: AI Daily Pulse

It is March 26th, 2026, and if you thought the infrastructure wars were cooling down, the last twenty-four hours just proved we’ve moved from the skirmish phase into total industrial mobilization. We are officially in the era of the "AI Factory," and NVIDIA just handed everyone the keys to the engine room. Al...

item.title: **Rise of Agents: How Computer Use and New Infrastructure Redefine AI**
item.description: **AI Daily Pulse** **Date:** Tuesday, March 24, 2026 **Hosts:** Alex (Technical Architect) & Marcus (Strategic Visionary) [START AUDIO] **MARCUS:** Welcome back to the Pulse. It is Tuesday, March 24th, and if you haven’t checked your terminal in the last six hours, the world looks a little different. We are finally seeing the "Computer Use" dam break. Yesterday, the major labs moved from experimental "browser-only" agents to full OS-level autonomy. Alex, I’m looking at the strategic implicatio...

item.title: **OpenAI Achieves Human Level Intelligence Sparking A Massive Global Market Transformation**
item.description:
Intelligence Brief:

  • Real-time AI Intelligence Update

**AI Daily Pulse: March 23, 2026** **MARCUS:** It is Monday, March 23rd, 2026. I’m Marcus, and I’m looking at a landscape today that feels like it’s finally shifting from "experimental" to "infrastructure-level." We’ve spent the last year talking about the *possibility* of autonomous enterprise agents, but the data coming out of the NVIDIA-Microsoft "Project Hera" launch this morning suggests the scale is finally here. We’re talking about a unified cluster architecture that treats 100,000 B300 ...

item.title: **GIGABYTE Launches 20 PetaFLOPS Desktop Supercomputer As Qwen Models Hit MacBooks**
item.description:
Intelligence Brief:

  • Real-time AI Intelligence Update

**AI Daily Pulse** **Date:** October 24, 202X **Hosts:** Alex (Technical Architect) & Marcus (Strategic Visionary) **Marcus:** Welcome back to the Pulse. We are living through a week where the term "exponential" feels like an understatement. OpenAI is iterating so fast it’s giving developers whiplash, but the real story might actually be happening on the hardware side—both in the massive data centers and, surprisingly, on a single laptop. **Alex:** Yeah, if you’re a DevOps engineer or an arch...

item.title: **NVIDIA Nemotron Three Super: Ten Trillion Tokens To End Proprietary AI Dominance**
item.description:
Intelligence Brief:

  • NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super Release

  • ByteDance 36K Blackwell Cluster
  • Anthropic Claude Inline Visuals
  • NVIDIA $26B Open-Weight Commitment
  • Corvex Secure Weights TEE
  • Google Maps Gemini 3.1 Overhaul

**AI Daily Pulse** **Date:** Friday, March 13, 2026 **Episode:** The Sovereign Pivot **MARCUS:** Welcome back to AI Daily Pulse. It is Friday, March 13th, 2026, and if you thought the industry was settling into a comfortable triopoly between OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google, NVIDIA just threw a twenty-six-billion-dollar wrench into that theory. I’m Marcus, and we are looking at a massive shift in how the "Sovereign AI" era is actually going to be built. **ALEX:** And I’m Alex. I’ve spent my morni...
